---
description: Project context for humor-judge work. Use this file for goals and success criteria, and use docs/datasets.md for dataset-specific details.
---

# Project Context

## Mission

- This project builds and evaluates an LLM-based humor judge.
- Long-term goal: improve the model's humor judgment quality to better match human preferences.

## Success Criteria

- The model ranks jokes in a way that correlates well with human ratings.
- Improvements are measured with explicit benchmark metrics instead of subjective impressions.

## Current Direction

- Focus on ranking and judging humor quality before broader generation work.
- Prefer measurable experiments that compare model behavior against human-rated data.

## How To Use Project Context

- For dataset details, read docs/datasets.md before coding data loading, preprocessing, or evaluation logic.
- If a task mentions Jester, ratings schema, or joke IDs, consult docs/datasets.md first.
